description: Group of Indians with low income and older age, who also either have limited education or are fully employed, and who either face visual impairment or are single.
sql_query:
SELECT "res_partner".id 
FROM "res_partner" 
WHERE ((((( "res_partner"."country_id" = '104')
         AND (("res_partner"."education_level" = 'primary')
              OR ("res_partner"."employment_status" = 'employed_full')))
        AND (("res_partner"."type_of_disability" = 'visual_impairment')
             OR ("res_partner"."marital_status" = 'single')))
       AND ("res_partner"."annual_income" = 'below_5000'))
      AND ("res_partner"."birthdate" < '1980-01-01'))

description: Single individuals with a Masters degree and low income from Gujarat, who either have a low debit limit (<300) or are unemployed.
sql_query:
SELECT "res_partner".id 
FROM "res_partner" 
WHERE (((("res_partner"."marital_status" = 'single')
         AND ("res_partner"."annual_income" = 'below_5000'))
        AND ("res_partner"."education_level" = 'masters'))
       AND (("res_partner"."debit_limit" < 300)
            OR ("res_partner"."employment_status" = 'unemployed')))
      AND ("res_partner"."state_id" = 594);

description: Records indicating the presence of a disability.
Married males born before 1960 with an annual income of 5001-10000, who either own agricultural land or are not from Tamil Nadu.
sql_query:
SELECT "res_partner".id 
FROM "res_partner" 
WHERE (((("res_partner"."birthdate" < '1960-01-01')
         AND (("res_partner"."type_of_land_owned" = 'agricultural')
              OR ("res_partner"."state_id" != 589)))
        AND ("res_partner"."gender" = 'Male'))
       AND ("res_partner"."marital_status" = 'married'))
  AND ("res_partner"."annual_income" = '5001_10000');

description: Households with pregnant/lactating women and malnourished children that belong to protected groups and have water access.
sql_query:
SELECT "res_partner".id
FROM "res_partner"
WHERE ("res_partner"."num_preg_lact_women" > 0)
    AND ("res_partner"."num_malnourished_children" > 0)
    AND ("res_partner"."belong_to_protected_groups" = 'yes')
    AND ("res_partner"."water_access" = 'yes');

description: Households that own a house and four-wheeler, have an annual income above 10,000, and hold either a bachelors or masters degree.
sql_query:
SELECT "res_partner".id
FROM "res_partner"
WHERE ("res_partner"."owns_house" = 'yes')
    AND ("res_partner"."owns_four_wheeler" = 'yes')
    AND ("res_partner"."annual_income" = 'above_10000')
    AND (("res_partner"."education_level" = 'bachelors')
        OR ("res_partner"."education_level" = 'masters'));
